name: send_password_reset
description: Send a password reset email to the specified email address. The email contains a magic link that redirects the user to your configured redirect URL where they can set a new password. Does not require authentication.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: The email address of the user requesting a password reset.

parameters.name: gotrue_meta_security
parameters.description: Security metadata including captcha_token for bot protection.
